author: y4rr
content: GpuVaeDecoder closure: GPU path mirrors CPU VaeDecoder structure; weights as CudaSlice<f32> in GpuDevice. New GPU primitives: gpu_group_norm_f32 (32 groups, ε=1e-6) + gpu_upsample_nearest_2x_f32. PASS bit-level: cosine_sim=1.0, max_abs=2.6e-5, ||rust||=||ref||=171.17. Even tighter than CPU's 1e-3 (cuBLAS f32 accumulation more deterministic than CPU reduction order). 0 dropped keys. 284 ferrotorch-gpu tests pass.
